pilots.description: Run unit tests for UDWDC-v2: EMA-smoothed rho_t, floor clipping at 0.1*lambda_base. Train 10 epochs CIFAR-10/ResNet-20 with UDWDC-v2, verify CSI_temporal > 0.5 and total WD budget > 0. Compare effective WD trajectory against original UDWDC.
pilots.pass_criteria: Unit tests pass; WD budget > 0 over 100 steps; CSI_temporal > 0.5 over 10 epochs; no NaN/Inf in lambda_t

pilots.pilot_name: Quick diagnostic on CIFAR-10 (10 epochs, 8 methods)
pilots.description: Train ResNet-20/CIFAR-10 for 10 epochs with all 8 methods (including UDWDC-v2). Verify rho_t trajectories differ. Check UDWDC-v2 stability improvement vs original.
pilots.pass_criteria: All 8 methods complete 10 epochs; rho_t differs across methods; UDWDC-v2 WD budget > 0

pilots.pilot_name: Quick ablation on CIFAR-100 (10 epochs, 8 variants with v2 floor)
pilots.description: Train VGG-16-BN/CIFAR-100 for 10 epochs with all UDWDC variants using v2 floor clipping. Verify ALL variants have WD budget > 0 (Kp_only and PD_control had zero in previous pilot).
pilots.pass_criteria: All 8 variants complete 10 epochs; ALL have WD budget > 0; no NaN/Inf; >20% accuracy

pilots.description: Test extreme batch sizes with UDWDC-v2. Verify SNR trend and WD budget stability.
pilots.pass_criteria: 4 configs complete 5 epochs; SNR at bs=512 > SNR at bs=64; UDWDC-v2 WD budget > 0 at all batch sizes

pilots.pilot_name: Quick grid sweep (6 runs at LR=0.1, seed=42)
pilots.description: Run 6 WD values at LR=0.1, seed=42 on CIFAR-100/ResNet-20 for 200 epochs. Same as before.
pilots.pass_criteria: 6 runs complete; alpha_bar varies; generalization gap varies by >2%

pilots.pilot_name: Quick ImageNet sanity (2 epochs, FixedWD + UDWDC-v2)
pilots.description: Train ResNet-50/ImageNet for 2 epochs with FixedWD and UDWDC-v2 using DDP on 2 GPUs. Verify UDWDC-v2 WD budget > 0 on ImageNet. Check no OOM. Verify first-epoch outputs differ between methods.
pilots.pass_criteria: Both methods complete 2 epochs; validation accuracy > 5%; UDWDC-v2 WD budget > 0; first-epoch metrics differ

pilots.pilot_name: Quick ViT-S/16 sanity (2 epochs, FixedWD + UDWDC-v2)
pilots.description: Train ViT-S/16/ImageNet for 2 epochs with FixedWD and UDWDC-v2. Verify augmentation, diagnostics, WD budget.
pilots.pass_criteria: Both methods complete 2 epochs; augmentation correct; UDWDC-v2 WD budget > 0

key_changes: Added udwdc_v2_fix as CRITICAL first pilot — must fix zero-WD-budget anomaly before any other experiment
All UDWDC variants now use v2 floor clipping to prevent WD collapse
ImageNet pilot includes first-epoch output independence verification to catch data corruption
Added UDWDC-v2 to all pilots alongside original UDWDC for comparison
